Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.predicate

Interface IContext

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractContext
public interface IContext
This is the interface for the builder context. It is updated each time PredicateLoader#build() is called. It is used to retrieve the list of all labels and normalized formulas that are available after the first phase of the normalization process.

TODO review this interface

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<LiteralDescriptor>
    getAllDescriptors()
    Returns all descriptors.
    Collection<PredicateDescriptor>
    getAllPredicateDescriptors()
    Returns all predicate descriptors produced by the normalization process.
    int
    getFreshVariableIndex()
    Returns a fresh variable index.
    INormalizedFormula
    getLastResult()
    Returns the normalized formula of the last predicate that has been loaded into this context.
    int
    getNextLiteralIdentifier()
    Returns the next literal identifier.
    List<INormalizedFormula>
    getResults()
    Returns a list containing the normalized formula of each predicate that has been loaded into this context.
    void
    load(Predicate predicate, boolean isGoal)
    Loads the given predicate in this context.

    Loads the given sequent in this context.

  • Method Details

    • load

      void load(ISimpleSequent sequent)
      Loads the given sequent in this context.
      Parameters:
      sequent - the sequent to load

    • load

      void load(Predicate predicate, boolean isGoal)
      Loads the given predicate in this context.

      If isGoal is true, the predicate will be loaded as a goal (negated).

      Parameters:
      predicate - the predicate to load
      isGoal - true iff the predicate should be loaded as a goal

    • getAllPredicateDescriptors

      Collection<PredicateDescriptor> getAllPredicateDescriptors()
      Returns all predicate descriptors produced by the normalization process.

      TODO this method should not be in this interface

      Returns:
      all predicate descriptors produced by the normalization process

    • getAllDescriptors

      Collection<LiteralDescriptor> getAllDescriptors()
      Returns all descriptors.

      TODO this method should not be in this interface

      Returns:
      all descriptors

    • getResults

      List<INormalizedFormula> getResults()
      Returns a list containing the normalized formula of each predicate that has been loaded into this context.
      Returns:
      a list of all normalized formulas of the loaded predicates

    • getLastResult

      INormalizedFormula getLastResult()
      Returns the normalized formula of the last predicate that has been loaded into this context.
      Returns:
      the normalized formulas of the last loaded predicates

    • getNextLiteralIdentifier

      int getNextLiteralIdentifier()
      Returns the next literal identifier.

      Use to create new IndexedDescriptor.

      Returns:
      the next literal identifier

    • getFreshVariableIndex

      int getFreshVariableIndex()
      Returns a fresh variable index.
      Returns:
      a fresh variable index
